title: Untrack auto-generated .claude and .crosslink files from git

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--untrack-init-files
comments.content: Plan: 1) Add missing .gitignore entries for .crosslink/rules/ and .mcp.json. 2) Update the managed section comments to reflect that rules are auto-generated, not project policy. 3) Run git rm --cached on all auto-generated files (hooks, mcp server, rules, integrations, .mcp.json). 4) Keep .claude/settings.json and .crosslink/hook-config.json tracked. 5) Verify files still exist on disk. 6) Run tests. 7) Commit.

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--untrack-init-files
comments.content: Decision: Added .crosslink/rules/ and .mcp.json to .gitignore (they were missing). Updated comments to reflect rules are auto-generated from resource templates, not project policy. Only staged the git rm --cached deletions and .gitignore update — left hook-config.json reformatting out of scope.

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--untrack-init-files
comments.content: Result: Untracked 36 auto-generated files from git index using git rm --cached. Updated .gitignore to add missing entries for .crosslink/rules/ and .mcp.json. Only .claude/settings.json and .crosslink/hook-config.json remain tracked. All 146 tests pass, clippy clean.
